scores.correctness_notes: Covers all supported bases, architectures, multi-base builds with both shorthand and long forms. Correctly explains build-on/build-for semantics.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: states interim bases (24.10, 25.04) require 'build-base' key — the gold standard doesn't mention this requirement. Also missing the shorthand `ubuntu@22.04:amd64` platform name syntax shown in gold standard.
